    Method
    Description
    PotSlide
    PotPresentation.addSlide()
    Appends a new blank slide to the end of the presentation.
    PotSlide
    PotSlide.applyLayout(PotLayout layout)
    Applies a layout template to this slide.
    PotSlide
    PotPresentation.cloneSlide(int sourceIndex)
    Creates a duplicate of an existing slide and appends it to the presentation.
    PotSlide

    Finds a slide by its unique identifier.
    PotSlide
    IPotElement.getSlide()
    Returns the slide that contains this element.
    PotSlide
    PotElement.getSlide()
    Returns the parent slide containing this element.
    PotSlide
    PotPresentation.getSlide(int index)
    Retrieves the slide at the specified index.
    PotSlide
    PotPresentation.insertSlide(int index)
    Inserts a new blank slide at the specified index.
    PotSlide
    PotSlide.removeTransition()
    Removes any transition effect from this slide.
    PotSlide
    PotSlide.setBackground(PotColor color)
    Sets a solid color background for the slide.
    PotSlide
    PotSlide.setBackground(PotGradient gradient)
    Sets a gradient fill as the background of this slide.
    PotSlide
    PotSlide.setBackground(String imagePath)
    Sets an image as the background of this slide.
    PotSlide
    PotSlide.setHidden(boolean hidden)
    Sets the hidden state of this slide.
    PotSlide
    PotSlide.setNotes(String notes)
    Sets or updates the text content of the slide notes.
    PotSlide
    PotSlide.setTransition(PotTransition transition)
    Applies a slide transition effect.
